calendar.description: House Business, Labor, and Commerce Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill provides labeling requirements for menstrual products.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>requires a manufacturer of menstrual products sold in the state to list certain ingredients intentionally added on a label on the packaging of the menstrual prod<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the Division of Consumer Protection to enforce labeling requirements; <hr><ltbullet>defines terms; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
